category_sources: Official ESPHome GitHub description says ESPHome controls ESP32, ESP8266, BK72xx, and RP2040 devices through configuration files and home automation systems.
source_facts.description says ESPHome makes custom firmwares for ESP32/ESP8266 easy.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is esphome; official repository and docs brand the project as ESPHome.
docs_sources: Official ESPHome developer documentation is hosted at developers.esphome.io.
Official ESPHome documentation is hosted at esphome.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, and source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub source repository.
tags_sources: Official ESPHome repository description supports IoT/home automation and configuration-file tags.
source_facts.description supports ESP32, ESP8266, and firmware tags.
